name.description: Primary display name for the example document.

status.title: Status
status.description: Workflow state selected from a fixed set of publishing stages.

enabled.description: Turns the example feature on or off.

count.description: Whole-number quantity used for integer input testing.

ratio.title: Ratio
ratio.description: Floating-point value used for number input testing.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Variable-length list of short tag strings.

members.title: Members
members.description: Variable-length list of object items with mixed field types.

items.description: Member entry grouped under the parent array.

name.title: Member Name
name.description: Name of the member in this array item.

role.title: Role
role.description: Permission role selected from predefined options.

active.title: Active
active.description: Whether this member is currently active.

note.title: Note
note.description: Multi-line note field for textarea-style editing.
note.default:
First line of the note.
Second line for textarea editing.
